short_summary: Iran deal stalls, Trump strategy debated
rationale: Trump's Iran diplomacy claims contradicted by Tehran generate domestic political debate and keep Middle East/oil market uncertainty alive; no new escalation but the story remains active and policy-relevant for Americans.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing finalized' after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Trump's public claims of a near-deal contradicted by Iran, raising questions about US negotiating strategy and credibility. Affects oil prices and US Middle East policy debate directly.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran attacks after Kharg Island threat — war day 105
top_events.summary: US military posture toward Iran remains active; Trump's decision to halt strikes signals ongoing direct US involvement in Iran conflict management, with real consequences for oil markets and US forces.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot during US consulate attack investigation
top_events.summary: Attack near US consulate in Canada raises security concerns; limited direct domestic US impact but highlights cross-border security sensitivity during World Cup period.
